indicators.name: unobstructed floor area
indicators.rationale: The floor is clear of any furniture obstruction, allowing for free movement.

indicators.name: large windows providing natural light
indicators.rationale: Natural light can create a calming atmosphere conducive to yoga practice.

indicators.name: chairs arranged in rows
indicators.rationale: Chairs arranged in rows may limit the space available for yoga practice.

indicators.name: tables with decorative items
indicators.rationale: Tables with decorative items may obstruct the floor space needed for yoga.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for yoga practice due to the presence of chairs and tables that may obstruct the floor space. However, the unobstructed floor area and natural light contribute positively to the suitability of the space for yoga.
